# 記事候補 2026-06-25

採用する記事は `[ ]` を `[x]` に変更する。個別ノート化する場合は行末に `#important` を付ける。

- [x] [Code-Augur: Agentic Vulnerability Detection via Specification Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.18619) #important-recommended #applied #important
  <!-- research-news:-ODs-ODiOOBruaal-m7meOBruWJjeaPkOOCkuS7leanmOOBqOOBl-OBpuWkluWMluOBl-OAgeWun-ihjOaZguWPjeiovOOBp-aknOiovOOBmeOCi-ani-aIkOOBjOmuruOChOOBi-OAgkFJ44Gr44KI44KL6ISG5byx5oCn6Ki65pat44KS44CB6Kqs5piO5Y-v6IO95oCn44Go5qSc6Ki85Y-v6IO95oCn44KS5YKZ44GI44Gf44Ov44O844Kv44OV44Ot44O844G45a-E44Gb44KL5YW35L2T5L6L44Go44GX44Gm6L-944GE44Gf44GE44CCIiwiZnVsbF90ZXh0X3JlYWQiOnRydWUsIm1lbnRpb25zIjoxLCJzY29yZXMiOnsidGhlbWUiOjQwLCJ0cnVzdCI6MjAsIm1lbnRpb25zIjowLCJub3ZlbHR5IjoxNSwiZnJlc2huZXNzIjoxMH0sInNjb3JlIjo4NSwic291cmNlcyI6WyJhclhpdiJdLCJjb2xsZWN0ZWQiOiIyMDI2LTA2LTI1In0 -->
  - Score: **85/100** (theme 40, trust 20, mentions 0, novelty 15, freshness 10)
  - 公開日: 2026-06-17
  - 情報源: arXiv
  - テーマ: agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: Code-Augur makes an agent's security assumptions explicit as in-source assertions and uses guided fuzzing to falsify them. The authors report detecting more vulnerabilities than comparison agents and finding 22 previously unknown vulnerabilities in open-source projects.
  - Codexコメント案: エージェントの暗黙の前提を仕様として外化し、実行時反証で検証する構成が鮮やか。AIによる脆弱性診断を、説明可能性と検証可能性を備えたワークフローへ寄せる具体例として追いたい。
  - 本文確認: 済

- [x] [SkillHone: A Harness for Continual Agent Skill Evolution Through Persistent Decision History](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08671) #important-recommended #applied #important
  <!-- research-news:-OCkuWNmOeZuuOBruODl-ODreODs-ODl-ODiOizh-eUo-OBp-OBr-OBquOBj-OAgeipleS-oeiovOaLoOOBqOaEj-aAneaxuuWumuWxpeattOOCkuaMgeOBpOe2mee2muaUueWWhOWvvuixoeOBqOOBl-OBpuaJseOBhuioreioiOOAguOCueOCreODq-mBi-eUqOOBp-OAjOOBquOBnOOBk-OBruWkieabtOOCkuaOoeeUqOOBl-OBn-OBi-OAjeOCkuaui-OBmeWun-WLmeODkeOCv-ODvOODs-OBqOOBl-OBpueJueOBq-ebuOaAp-OBjOOCiOOBhOOAgiIsImZ1bGxfdGV4dF9yZWFkIjp0cnVlLCJtZW50aW9ucyI6MSwic2NvcmVzIjp7InRoZW1lIjo0MCwidHJ1c3QiOjIwLCJtZW50aW9ucyI6MCwibm92ZWx0eSI6MTUsImZyZXNobmVzcyI6OH0sInNjb3JlIjo4Mywic291cmNlcyI6WyJhclhpdiJdLCJjb2xsZWN0ZWQiOiIyMDI2LTA2LTI1In0 -->
  - Score: **83/100** (theme 40, trust 20, mentions 0, novelty 15, freshness 8)
  - 公開日: 2026-06-07
  - 情報源: arXiv
  - テーマ: agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: SkillHone records diagnoses, revisions, evidence, outcomes, and rejected alternatives so agent skills can improve across sessions without losing the rationale behind prior changes. The authors report gains on GAIA, WebWalkerQA-EN, and seven internal tool-mediated analysis settings; version 2 was posted on June 23.
  - Codexコメント案: スキルを単発のプロンプト資産ではなく、評価証拠と意思決定履歴を持つ継続改善対象として扱う設計。スキル運用で「なぜこの変更を採用したか」を残す実務パターンとして特に相性がよい。
  - 本文確認: 済

- [x] [AgentCanary: A Security Evaluation Framework for Autonomous AI Agents in Real Executable Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.10484) #important-recommended #applied #important
  <!-- research-news:_44GI44KL44CCIiwiZnVsbF90ZXh0X3JlYWQiOnRydWUsIm1lbnRpb25zIjoxLCJzY29yZXMiOnsidGhlbWUiOjQwLCJ0cnVzdCI6MjAsIm1lbnRpb25zIjowLCJub3ZlbHR5IjoxNSwiZnJlc2huZXNzIjo4fSwic2NvcmUiOjgzLCJzb3VyY2VzIjpbImFyWGl2Il0sImNvbGxlY3RlZCI6IjIwMjYtMDYtMjUifQ -->
  - Score: **83/100** (theme 40, trust 20, mentions 0, novelty 15, freshness 8)
  - 公開日: 2026-06-09
  - 情報源: arXiv
  - テーマ: agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: AgentCanary evaluates autonomous agents in executable environments using an Entry-by-Impact risk taxonomy and trajectory-level scoring for outcome safety, security awareness, and task utility. Its experiments report persistent weaknesses against compromised skills, persistent-state attacks, and long-horizon attacks.
  - Codexコメント案: 最終回答や単発ツール呼び出しだけでなく、実行軌跡全体を安全性評価の単位にする点が重要。権限を持つ業務エージェントのテスト設計や、攻撃を認識できたかと業務を完遂できたかの分離に使える。
  - 本文確認: 済

- [x] [AI Harness Engineering: A Runtime Substrate for Foundation-Model Software Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13357) #important-recommended #applied #important
  <!-- research-news:_jgIHlrp_ooYzln7rnm6Tjga7oqK3oqIjosqzku7vjgpIxMemgheebruOBq-WIhuino-OBl-OBpuOBhOOCi-OBn-OCgeOAgeOCqOODvOOCuOOCp-ODs-ODiOmWi-eZuuOBruODgeOCp-ODg-OCr-ODquOCueODiOOBqOOBl-OBpuW8t-OBhOOAguaoqemZkOODu-aknOiovOODu-ims-a4rOWPr-iDveaAp-OCkuWQjOOBmOioreioiOmdouOBp-aJseOBhuaVtOeQhuOBr-OAgeOBk-OBruS_neeuoeW6q-OBruS4reW_g-ODhuODvOODnuOBq-ebtOe1kOOBmeOCi-OAgiIsImZ1bGxfdGV4dF9yZWFkIjp0cnVlLCJtZW50aW9ucyI6MSwic2NvcmVzIjp7InRoZW1lIjo0MCwidHJ1c3QiOjIwLCJtZW50aW9ucyI6MCwibm92ZWx0eSI6MTUsImZyZXNobmVzcyI6NH0sInNjb3JlIjo3OSwic291cmNlcyI6WyJhclhpdiJdLCJjb2xsZWN0ZWQiOiIyMDI2LTA2LTI1In0 -->
  - Score: **79/100** (theme 40, trust 20, mentions 0, novelty 15, freshness 4)
  - 公開日: 2026-05-13
  - 情報源: arXiv
  - テーマ: agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: The paper frames software-agent capability as a property of the model-harness-environment system and defines eleven harness responsibilities, including context selection, permissions, observability, verification, failure attribution, and intervention recording. It also proposes a four-level harness ladder and trace-based evaluation packages.
  - Codexコメント案: モデル性能だけでなく、実行基盤の設計責任を11項目に分解しているため、エージェント開発のチェックリストとして強い。権限・検証・観測可能性を同じ設計面で扱う整理は、この保管庫の中心テーマに直結する。
  - 本文確認: 済

- [ ] [Security in a Workflow: Exploring Role-Based Agentic Architectures for Vulnerability Handling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14261) #important-recommended
  <!-- research-news:_jgZHjgafjga_jgarjgYTjgIHjgajjgYTjgYbnj77lrp_ -->
  - Score: **79/100** (theme 38, trust 20, mentions 0, novelty 13, freshness 8)
  - 公開日: 2026-06-12
  - 情報源: arXiv
  - テーマ: agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: The study models vulnerability handling as Planner, Analyzer, Fixer, and Verifier roles, with one workflow integrating CodeQL. Across 25 real-world C/C++ vulnerabilities it reports 44% detection accuracy and 19% fix accuracy.
  - Codexコメント案: 役割分担を増やせば自動的に高精度になるわけではない、という現実的な数字が有用。検出・修正・検証を別工程として評価し、静的解析をどこへ差し込むか考える材料になる。
  - 本文確認: 済

- [ ] [The latest updates to Google Pay](https://developers.googleblog.com/the-latest-updates-to-google-pay)
  <!-- research-news: -->
  - Score: **71/100** (theme 34, trust 20, mentions 0, novelty 15, freshness 2)
  - 公開日: 不明
  - 情報源: Google Developers Blog
  - テーマ: ai-native-society, agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: Google Pay is evolving for "agentic commerce" by introducing the Universal Commerce Protocol and a new MCP server that allows AI agents to manage integrations and analyze trends. New Android updates introduce dynamic callbacks for seamless express checkouts and extend payment support into social media apps via WebViews. Additionally, the platform is launching cross-device biometric authentication and new transaction signals to help merchants reduce friction and optimize processing costs.
  - Codexコメント案: 未作成。
  - 本文確認: 未確認またはメタデータのみ

- [ ] [A2UI + MCP Apps: Combining the best of declarative and custom agentic UIs](https://developers.googleblog.com/a2ui-and-mcp-apps)
  <!-- research-news: -->
  - Score: **65/100** (theme 28, trust 20, mentions 0, novelty 15, freshness 2)
  - 公開日: 不明
  - 情報源: Google Developers Blog
  - テーマ: ai-native-society, agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: This post introduces three architectural patterns designed to integrate Model Context Protocol (MCP) Apps and Agent-to-User Interface (A2UI) to solve the tradeoff between highly custom iframe environments and native, declarative rendering. By combining these approaches, developers can serve native-feeling UIs directly over MCP servers, embed complex and stateful iframe apps securely inside declarative views, or inject generative UI components into legacy systems. Ultimately, these hybrid framewo
  - Codexコメント案: 未作成。

- [ ] [An important update: Transitioning Gemini CLI to Antigravity CLI](https://developers.googleblog.com/an-important-update-transitioning-gemini-cli-to-antigravity-cli)

  - 情報源: Google Developers Blog
  - テーマ: ai-native-society, agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: Google is unifying its AI terminal tools by transitioning the community-focused Gemini CLI into Antigravity CLI, a new agent-first platform built for complex, multi-agent workflows. This new Go-based tool offers faster execution, asynchronous processing, and a unified architecture that syncs with the Antigravity 2.0 desktop application. While enterprise customers will maintain existing access, individual and free users must transition to the new platform before Gemini CLI stops serving requests 
  - Codexコメント案: 未作成。

  - テーマ: ai-native-society, agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: Celebrating the first anniversary of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol, this blog post highlights how the framework enables autonomous AI agents to securely collaborate and hand off tasks without the rigidity of traditional APIs. By delegating complex workflows to specialized peer agents, A2A prevents context pollution, ensures data privacy, and simplifies application design through modularity.   - Codexコメント案: 未作成。

- [ ] [Gemma 4 12B: The Developer Guide](https://developers.googleblog.com/gemma-4-12b-the-developer-guide)
  <!-- research-news: -->
  - Score: **59/100** (theme 22, trust 20, mentions 0, novelty 15, freshness 2)
  - 公開日: 不明
  - 情報源: Google Developers Blog
  - テーマ: ai-native-society
  - 事実要約: The newly released Gemma 4 12B is a dense, multimodal model designed for high-performance local AI execution on consumer devices. By introducing a novel, encoder-free architecture, it bypasses traditional visual and audio encoders to feed multimodal data directly into the LLM backbone.
  - Codexコメント案: 未作成。
  - 本文確認: 未確認またはメタデータのみ

To accelerate development, the community offers curated learning pathways for mastering LLM optimization, GPU-accelerated data analytics, and monthly expert-led webinars. Moving into its second year, the initiative will expand to include hands-on labs, engineering events, and specialized content focused 
  - Codexコメント案: 未作成。

- [ ] [Supercharge your integration workflow with the Google Pay & Wallet Developer MCP server](https://developers.googleblog.com/supercharge-your-integration-workflow-with-the-google-pay-wallet-developer-mcp-server)

  - 情報源: Google Developers Blog
  - テーマ: ai-native-society, agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: Google has announced the new Google Pay & Wallet Developer MCP server, an open-standard tool designed to securely connect AI development assistants and IDEs with real-time API and account context. The server allows developers to remain within their development environment to search official documentation, validate Wallet pass definitions, check integration status, and manage merchant accounts. Ultimately, this integration aims to reduce friction and accelerate development workflows by minimizing
  - Codexコメント案: 未作成。

  <!-- research-news:eyJ0aXRsZSI6IuODl-ODreODs-ODl-ODiOOBr-S6uuaJi-ODgeODpeODvOODi-ODs-OCsOOBi--OCiOOCi-mAsuWMlueahOODl-ODreODs-ODl-ODiOacgOmBqeWMluOCkllhaG9vIeaknOe0ouOBruWBpeW6t-WMu-eZguezu0FJ5Zue562U44G46YGp55So44GX44Gf5LqL5L6L44CC5YCZ6KOc55Sf5oiQ44CBTExNLWFzLWEtSnVkZ2XoqZXkvqHjgIHoh6rnhLboqIDoqp7jg5XjgqPjg7zjg4njg5Djg4Pjgq_jgavjgojjgovmlLnlloTjgpLlj43lvqnjgZfjgIHlvpPmnaXjga_mlbDml6XjgJzmlbDpgLHplpPjgYvjgYvjgaPjgZ_oqr_mlbTjgpLntIQx5pmC6ZaT44Gr55-t57iu44GX44Gf44CC5Lq65omL5a6a5oCn6KmV5L6h44Gn44Gv44G744G8MTAw77yF44Gu44Od44Oq44K344O85rqW5oug44KS6YGU5oiQ44GX44Gf5LiA5pa544CB6KmV5L6h5Zmo44Gu5LiA6LKr5oCn44CB5Lq65omL56K66KqN44CB44OX44Ot44Oz44OX44OI6IKl5aSn5YyW44KS5Yi257SE44Go44GX44Gm5oyZ44GS44Gm44GE44KL44CCIiwiY29tbWVudGFyeSI6IuODl-ODreODs-ODl-ODiOOBneOBruOCguOBruOCiOOCiuOAgeipleS-oemWouaVsOOBqOS6uumWk-OBrueiuuiqjeWig-eVjOOCkuioreioiOOBmeOCi-OBk-OBqOOBjEFJ5qmf6IO96ZaL55m644Gu5Lit5b-D44Gr44Gq44KL5a6f6Le15L6L44CC44Ko44O844K444Kn44Oz44OI44KE55Sf5oiQQUnjg6_jg7zjgq_jg5Xjg63jg7zjgafjgoLjgIHmlLnlloTjg6vjg7zjg5fjgpLlho3nj77lj6_og73jgarku5XntYTjgb_ -->
  - Score: **88/100** (theme 40, trust 15, mentions 8, novelty 15, freshness 10)
  - 公開日: 2026-06-23
  - 情報源: LINEヤフー Tech Blog, Workflowy Inbox
  - テーマ: ai-native-society, agent-engineering
  - 事実要約: LINEヤフーが、DSPyのGEPAによる進化的プロンプト最適化をYahoo!検索の健康医療系AI回答へ適用した事例。候補生成、LLM-as-a-Judge評価、自然言語フィードバックによる改善を反復し、従来は数日〜数週間かかった調整を約1時間に短縮した。人手定性評価ではほぼ100％のポリシー準拠を達成した一方、評価器の一貫性、人手確認、プロンプト肥大化を制約として挙げている。
  - Codexコメント案: プロンプトそのものより、評価関数と人間の確認境界を設計することがAI機能開発の中心になる実践例。エージェントや生成AIワークフローでも、改善ループを再現可能な仕組みに変える際の参考になる。
  - 本文確認: 済
